title: trifolium coeruleum
intro: Trifolium coeruleum, also known as blue trefoil, is a type of perennial herb belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Trifolium coeruleum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable remedy for cardiovascular health. Blue trefoil can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions for consumption, and its flowers and leaves can also be used in culinary applications.
